title: Ice and Fire - Visual Rework
body:
Changes all textures from mod "[Ice & Fire](https://modrinth.com/mod/ice-and-fire-dragons)" By Alex to vanilla-like style. 
v1.0: 
At the moment, this pack has completely refreshed texture of items and armor (Mobs and entity WIP).
-  Also you may visit my [Twitter](https://x.com/Lalo_Madsen) to see my other stuff.
